sizing_rule.note: Van Tharp 1-R model: risk exactly 5% of starting equity per trade, normalized across all instruments regardless of volatility. Entry conditions (win rate >50%, R:R >2.5) are filters, not sizing triggers.

source_rule_text: A trader should size positions using a percent-risk model that normalizes risk (1-R) to a consistent percentage of account, regardless of instrument or market conditions, based on the difference between entry price and initial stop loss.
